name: WS - Real Time State and Weight
WS - Real Time State and Weight
Work Order
query:
SELECT 
    NPORD AS workOrder, 
    NPFGN AS itemNumber, 
    NPQTY AS qty
FROM OracleFilter

WHERE NPORD = '{{{ payload }}}'

name: Attachment
query:
SELECT TOP(1000) '{{ payload.workOrder }}' AS workOrder
    ,[SEGMENT1] AS itemNumber
    ,{{ payload.qty }} AS qty
    ,[SHORT_TEXT] AS shortText
FROM [USSTLIAPBINDB03].[HSA_ORCL_US_FP].[dbo].[ItemAttachment]
WHERE SEGMENT1 = '{{ payload.itemNumber }}' AND CATEGORY = 'To WIP' AND TITLE = 'WIP TEXT'

name: Parser
RECIPE bak
query:
-- SELECT TOP(100) *
SELECT 
    NPORD AS workOrder, 
    NPCAT AS catalogNumber, 
    NPFGN AS finishedGood, 
    NPQTY AS qty, 
    111.2 AS unitWeight
FROM OracleFilter
-- INNER JOIN IMSFG 
-- ON IMSFG.ITEM_NUMBER COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT = OracleFilter.NPFGN COLLATE DATABASE_DEFAULT
WHERE NPORD = '{{{ payload }}}'

name: Coil - Item Attachment bak
query:
SELECT TOP(1000) [WAREHOUSE]
      ,[SEGMENT1] AS ITEM_NUMBER
      ,[INVENTORY_ITEM_ID]
      ,[SEQ_NUM]
      ,[CATEGORY]
      ,[TITLE]
      ,[SHORT_TEXT]
      ,[CREATION_DATE]
      ,[CREATED_BY]
      ,[LAST_UPDATE_DATE]
      ,[ATTACHED_DOCUMENT_ID]
      ,[ItemAttach_BatchId]
  FROM [USSTLIAPBINDB03].[HSA_ORCL_US_FP].[dbo].[ItemAttachment]
  WHERE SEGMENT1 = '{{ payload }}' AND CATEGORY = 'To WIP' AND TITLE = 'WIP TEXT'

name: BomItems
query:
SELECT DISTINCT TOP (1000) [INVENTORY_ITEM_ID]
      ,[ITEM_NUMBER]
      ,[DESCRIPTION]
      ,[ORACLE_ITEM_TYPE]
      ,[EXPRESS_TYPE]
      ,[COMPONENT_ITEM_ID]
  FROM [MES_dev].[dbo].[vBomComponentsID]
  WHERE ITEM_NUMBER = '{{{ payload.ITEM_NUMBER }}}'
  ORDER BY INVENTORY_ITEM_ID

name: function 3
BomComponents
query:
SELECT DISTINCT TOP (5000) [INVENTORY_ITEM_ID]
      ,[ITEM_NUMBER]
      ,[DESCRIPTION]
      ,[ORACLE_ITEM_TYPE]
      ,[EXPRESS_TYPE]
      ,[COMPONENT_ITEM_ID]
  FROM [MES_dev].[dbo].[vBomComponentsID]
--  WHERE ITEM_NUMBER = '{{{ payload.ITEM_NUMBER }}}'
  WHERE NOT ORACLE_ITEM_TYPE IN ('ATO OPTION CLASS','ATO MODEL') AND INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IN({{{ payload }}})
  ORDER BY INVENTORY_ITEM_ID

name: function 4
BomComponents 2nd Lvl
query:
SELECT DISTINCT TOP (5000) [INVENTORY_ITEM_ID]
      ,[ITEM_NUMBER]
      ,[DESCRIPTION]
      ,[ORACLE_ITEM_TYPE]
      ,[EXPRESS_TYPE]
      ,[COMPONENT_ITEM_ID]
  FROM [MES_dev].[dbo].[vBomComponentsID]
--  WHERE ITEM_NUMBER = '{{{ payload.ITEM_NUMBER }}}'
  WHERE NOT ORACLE_ITEM_TYPE IN ('ATO OPTION CLASS','ATO MODEL') AND INVENTORY_ITEM_ID IN({{{ payload }}})
  ORDER BY INVENTORY_ITEM_ID

name: function 5
Eng Notes
query:
SELECT DISTINCT TOP(100) [ITEM_NUMBER]
      ,IAV.[ATTR_GROUP_NAME]
      ,IAV.[ATTR_NAME]
      ,DESCRIPTION
      ,[ATTR_VALUE]
      ,CONCAT(DESCRIPTION, ': ', ATTR_VALUE) AS NOTE
FROM [USSTLIAPBINDB03].[HSA_ORCL_US_FP].[dbo].[Item_Atrributes_Value] AS IAV
INNER JOIN [USSTLIAPBINDB03].[HSA_ORCL_US_FP].[dbo].[ItemUDAMaster] AS IUM ON IAV.[ATTR_NAME] = IUM.[ATTR_NAME]

WHERE ITEM_NUMBER = '{{ payload }}'
AND IUM.ATTR_GROUP_NAME IN('XXPIM_PRODUCT_INFO','XXPIM_CARTON_INFO','XXPIM_PRODUCT_INFO2','XXPIM_PRODUCT_INFO3','XXPIM_PRODUCT_INFO4','XXPIM_NAMEPLATE_INFO','XXPIM_LASER_MARK_INFO','XXPIM_TEST_PARAMETERS')
ORDER BY /*ATTR_GROUP_NAME, */DESCRIPTION
